mapper.select: SELECT m.meetingId, m.hostUserId, u.nickname AS hostNickname, m.title, m.content, m.thumbnailImage, m.placeName, m.address, m.meetingDate, m.startTime, m.maxMembers, m.status, s.name AS sportName, CONCAT(r.sido, " ", r.sigungu, " ", COALESCE(r.dong, "")) AS regionName, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM meetingParticipants mp WHERE mp.meeting_id=m.meeting_id AND mp.status="APPROVED" ) approved_count FROM meetings m JOIN users u ON m.hostUserId = u.userId JOIN sports s ON m.sportId = s.sportId JOIN regions r ON m.regionId = r.regionId WHERE m.meetingId = #{meetingId} AND m.deletedAt IS NULL
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO meetings( hostUserId, sportId, regionId, title, content, thumbnailImage, placeName, address, meetingDate, startTime, maxMembers, meetingType, repeatType, supplies, guideText,
status ) VALUES( #{hostUserId}, #{sportId}, #{regionId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{thumbnailImage}, #{placeName}, #{address}, #{meetingDate}, #{startTime}, #{maxMembers}, #{meetingType}, #{repeatType}, #{supplies}, #{guideText}, #{status} )
mapper.update: UPDATE meetings SET title = #{request.title}, content = #{request.content}, placeName = #{request.placeName}, address = #{request.address}, meetingDate = #{request.meetingDate}, startTime = #{request.startTime}, maxMembers = #{request.maxMembers}, status = #{request.status} WHERE meetingId = #{meetingId} AND deletedAt IS NULL
